## Installation

### Quick Install
```bash
curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vicsejas/clipmanx/main/install-latest.sh | sudo bash
```

### Manual Install
Download `clipmanx_X.X.X-1_all.deb` from this release and run:
```bash
sudo apt-get install -y ./clipmanx_X.X.X-1_all.deb
```

## 🙏 Thanks

Thanks to all contributors and users who helped with this release!

---

**Package**: `clipmanx_X.X.X-1_all.deb`
**Requires**: Linux Mint 22.3+ / Ubuntu 24.04+ / Debian 11+
**Python**: 3.10+
